input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule D.11.1.2 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:

            TITLE: the autocross course specifications may deviate from the above to accommodate event site

D.11.1.2 The Autocross course specifications may deviate from the above to accommodate event site 
requirements.

final_answer: The Autocross course specifications may deviate from the above to accommodate event site requirements.
